THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST SELECT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALANGIAN, ROSELYN N. $2,576.05 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $285.10 INTEREST, $136.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,557.15, *IT IS STIPULATED AND AGREED THAT DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE SUM OF $130.00 PER MONTH, COMMENCING 3/22/2000 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL.
